enforcement.check: Brokers must not contain business logic (filter, map, reduce, validation)
enforcement.message: Business logic detected in broker. Move filtering, mapping, or validation to service layer.

enforcement.check: Broker class names must follow pattern {Entity}{Type}Broker
enforcement.message: Broker class name should end with 'Broker' (e.g., PatientApiBroker, LocalStorageBroker).
Exception caught but not rethrown. Brokers must propagate failures.

enforcement.check: Brokers must not call other brokers
enforcement.message: Broker is injecting another broker. Composition happens in services, not brokers.
